what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment ledger entry that records an attachment identifier, its type (board_items), the target board item URI, the originating channel, and a creation timestamp.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It references a target board item using the URI scheme board://item-e42d651f.
standouts: The target is a board:// URI rather than a local file path.
The file is a minimal, content-empty metadata record.
The attachment_type explicitly categorizes the record as board_items.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a stable att-* identifier.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset.
Uses a board:// URI scheme to reference an external board item.
Keeps the record minimal and file-local.
concerns: The body is empty, so the actual payload or content of the attachment is not stored here.
No author or editor metadata is recorded.
The board:// target cannot be resolved or validated from this file alone.
No version or update history is present.
notes: A bare channel-memory attachment record that points to a board item but carries no attachment content itself.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment represent?
Who created or last modified this attachment record?
What is the semantic relationship between the attachment and the board item?
Is the board:// target expected to be resolved elsewhere in the system?
intention_signals: It appears to register an attachment entry in a channel memory ledger so that a board item can be associated with the dragnet-development channel and discovered by attachment type.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI as the target of a channel attachment record.
contribution: It preserves the typed association between attachment att-4ab50efb and board item item-e42d651f, along with the channel and creation timestamp, for later fusion and lookup.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment record for dragnet-development that links attachment att-4ab50efb, of type board_items, to board item board://item-e42d651f and records its creation timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To register a board-item attachment in the channel memory ledger for cross-reference and audit.
